name: EUDEMONIA
subtitle: Filter, Mixer & VCA
summary: Analog signal processor in 10 HP combining a 3-to-1 mixer, dual series filters (24 dB resonant low-pass + 18 dB non-resonant high-pass), and an exponential VCA with peak indicator. LED indicators display the CV sum for each section. Part of the Dreadbox Chromatic Modules series.
